forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 58. West wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 79. South wind 3 to 10 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the night drapes its quiet, soft charcoal fabric over Boston, the scattered city lights twinkle like faraway stars struggling to catch attention. A gentle westward breeze whispers through the streets, bringing a faint chill that hints at the comforting embrace of the upcoming dawn. In just a few hours, the sun will rise, unveiling a delightful Tuesday—mostly sunny with the promise of a mild high near 79. The air will carry the light warmth of a southern wind, though a few ephemeral clouds might flirt with the horizon, adding just a touch of drama to the day. 

For the early risers, a light jacket will suffice, basking in the transition from night to day. As the sun climbs higher, shedding its golden rays, the warmth will beckon you outdoors. Imagine strolling along the Charles River, the gentle hum of morning traffic blending with the soft rustling of leaves, or perhaps finding a cozy café, where you can enjoy a warm beverage while watching the city awaken. With the forecast hinting at negligible showers, today is not just a day for errands but an invitation to pause and savor the simplicity of life, whether through a leisurely walk or simply sitting in a park with a book.
